query:
=== Recent conversation (last 0 exchanges) ===
[Assistant] All three gates confirmed PASS. Spawning security reviewer.
[tool: Bash(grep -i "pass\|fail" product/features/crt-034/reports/gate-3a-report.md | head -3; grep -i "pass\|fail" product/features) → > Result: PASS
| Architecture alignment | PASS | All 4 components match architecture decomposition; interface contracts correct |
| Specification coverage | PASS | All 17 FRs and 15 ACs addressed in pseudocode; f64 type correction applied per ADR-003 |
> Result: PASS
| Pseudocode fidelity | PASS | A]
[tool: Bash(grep "GATE RESULT" product/features/crt-034/reports/gate-3a-report.md product/features/crt-034/reports/gate-3b-report.md) → Exit code 1]
[tool: Bash(grep -l "GATE RESULT: PASS" product/features/crt-034/reports/gate-3a-report.md product/features/crt-034/reports/gate-3b-) → Exit code 1]
=== End recent conversation ===

entries.title: Gate 3c: always grep non-negotiable test names before accepting RISK-COVERAGE-REPORT PASS claims
Gate rework: verify caller pseudocode when fixing callee interface (and vice versa)
ADR-003 crt-028: Graceful Degradation Contract — Transcript Block Only, BriefingContent Always Emits
ADR-003: One Composite Stewardship Check Per Gate
AC-22-style CI grep gates must exclude test code — domain strings in test helpers cause false failures
